name: smart-terminal
description: AI-powered smart terminal with SSH support
author: SmartTerminal Team

scripts.dev:electron:wait: wait-on http://localhost:5173 && wait-on dist/main/index.js && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron .
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:main
scripts.release:patch: npm run version:patch && git add -A && git commit -m "chore: bump version to $(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" && git tag v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git push origin develop --tags
scripts.release:minor: npm run version:minor && git add -A && git commit -m "chore: bump version to $(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" && git tag v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git push origin develop --tags
